name: Nuoc Leo#1
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Tuong (also known as Vietnamese fish sauce)
Fresh hot red chili slices, to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the granulated sugar with the Tuong and water until well combined.
2. Add a few slices of fresh hot red chili peppers.
3. Sprinkle chopped roasted peanuts over the mixture.
Side notes:
- Roasted peanuts - Toast shelled peanuts in a very hot wok until their skins turn black and scorched. Allow to cool for 2-3 minutes, then transfer to a colander to remove excess oil.
- Tuong (Vietnamese fish sauce) - Sometimes referred to as Vietnamese soy sauce in the U.S., it is distinct from regular soy sauce. The Classic Cuisine of Vietnam by Bach Ngo & Gloria Zimmerman, Plume - a division of Penguin Books, NY, 1986).
